name: dangerous-professional
description: Strategic professional communication skill implementing patio11's Dangerous Professional framework. Helps write firm, specific, rights-aware correspondence for disputes with banks, insurers, contractors, landlords, employers, government agencies, and other institutions.

interface.shortDescription: Strategic professional correspondence using patio11's framework
interface.longDescription: Implements Patrick McKenzie's Dangerous Professional framework for writing firm, specific, rights-aware correspondence when dealing with institutions. Interview-driven workflow that reads your documents, identifies leverage, and drafts communications grounded in the institution's own records.
defaultPrompt: Help me write a dispute letter to my bank
I need to respond to an insurance denial
Draft a professional email to my contractor
